cases.description: Feature roadmap request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create a roadmap for the multi-tenant migration
expectations: Asks about scope, target, and dependencies
Saves a JSON file under docs/roadmaps/ with timestamped filename
Includes priority + status + dependencies per task
Does NOT produce a markdown implementation plan

cases.description: Quarterly milestone plan triggers the skill
cases.prompt: plan our Q3 milestones for the platform team
expectations: Saves the JSON with a roadmap filename in docs/roadmaps/

cases.prompt: break down the checkout epic into a tracked task list
expectations: Lists tasks with priority, status, and dependencies

cases.description: Implementation plan does NOT trigger roadmap
cases.prompt: write the implementation plan for the auth refactor
expectations: Produces a markdown [PLAN] doc, not a JSON roadmap

cases.description: In-conversation task tracking does NOT trigger roadmap
cases.prompt: let's keep track of the things we need to do in this session
expectations: Does NOT write a JSON roadmap for short-lived session tasks
